name: CBRA-PNW Riders
description: Pacific NW barrel racing community - season runs Mar-Oct, off-season Nov-Feb. Public results, gear chatter, travel coordination. No client/vendor business.

name: NW Equine Vet Tech Forum
description: Professional discussion for equine vet techs across OR/WA/ID. Case studies use de-identified examples only.
